creator: nick@schoko.org
text:
The current cvs-port /usr/ports/mail/imap-uw uses 
  imap-2001.BETA.SNAP-0104051333DISTFILES.tar.Z 
as source, but this file isn't available on the given ftp-servers anymore.

Fix: 

Update the port to use the new version.
How-To-Repeat: cvsup
cd /usr/ports/mail/imap-uw
make
